bird.name: 黑颊情侣鹦鹉
bird.summary: 黑颊情侣鹦鹉（ Agapornis nigrigenis ）是情侣鹦鹉属中的一种小型鹦鹉。它的全身主要为绿色，有着棕色的头，红色的喙和白色的眼周。 它是赞比亚西南部一个小地区的特有种，非常容易受到栖息地破坏的影响。

locations.name: 赞比亚
locations.summary: 赞比亚共和国（英語：Republic of Zambia），也稱尚比亞（英語：Zambia），是非洲東南部的一個內陸國家。与刚果民主共和国、坦桑尼亚、马拉维、莫桑比克、津巴布韦、博茨瓦纳、纳米比亚和安哥拉相邻。首都是卢萨卡。 历史 二千年…

relations.subject: 黑颊情侣鹦鹉
relations.evidence: It is mainly green and has a brown head, red beak, and white eyerings. It is endemic to a relatively small range in southwest Zambia, where it is vulnerable to habitat loss

relations.subject: 黑颊情侣鹦鹉
relations.evidence: It is listed as a vulnerable species as its population is in decline due to continuous habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 黑颊情侣鹦鹉
relations.evidence: This is due to gradual desiccation of water bodies, causing drought, farming practices, hunting and trapping, fishing, logging and diseases
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 黑颊情侣鹦鹉
relations.evidence: This is due to gradual desiccation of water bodies, causing drought, farming practices, hunting and trapping, fishing, logging and diseases
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
